configurations.name: api
runtimeArgs: import sys; sys.path[:0]=['src','config','.']; import uvicorn; uvicorn.run('app.main:app', host='127.0.0.1', port=8000)

configurations.name: flower
runtimeArgs: import sys; sys.path[:0]=['src','config','.']; from celery.__main__ import main; sys.argv=['celery','-A','app.tasks.celery_app','flower','--port=5555']; main()
